description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in the TAM console in IBM Tivoli Access Manager for e-business 6.1.0 before 6.1.0-TIV-TAM-FP0006 allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via (1) the parm1 parameter to ivt/ivtserver, or the method parameter to (2) acl, (3) domain, (4) group, (5) gso, (6) gsogroup, (7) os, (8) pop, (9) rule, (10) user, or (11) webseal in ibm/wpm/.
